caption: The video captures a scene inside an indoor basketball court, where a player is practicing shooting hoops. The camera focuses on the basketball as it arcs through the air towards the hoop, successfully going through it. The ball then bounces off the backboard and lands on the bleachers. A man in athletic attire walks towards the camera, likely the one who just made the shot. The gymnasium is well-lit with a polished wooden floor, blue-painted walls, and a set of bleachers on the left side. The environment suggests a quiet practice session, possibly for honing skills or preparing for a game.
